description: §18.8.1 — a COMPLETE match over a member-access subject (`match p.role` with an arm for every Role variant) is exhaustive and SHALL compile clean: neither E-TYPE-020 (non-exhaustive) nor E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM fires. The acceptance sibling of member-access-nonexhaustive — proves the member-access resolution narrows the exhaustiveness SET correctly rather than over-firing.
rationale: §18.8.1: a match is exhaustive iff every declared variant has an arm. A member-access subject resolves to the field's declared enum type; covering all three Role variants satisfies exhaustiveness, so no E-TYPE-020 / E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM is emitted.
